titleStmt.title: SII 5.650: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 650. (A.R. No. 90 of 1895). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭaivarmma rāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīsunda rapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 vatu meṣanāyaṟṟu A parapakṣattu caturtthi yum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ vaṭakarai rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu poykaināṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaḻapāṭiuṭaiya nāyanārkku cuttamalivaḷanāṭṭu pāmpuṇikkūṟṟattup pāmpuṇikiḻāṉ mallāṇṭāṉāṉa cerakoṉeṉ Innāyaṉār
koyilil nanda mahākāḷaṉ tiruvācalil cevikka nāṉ paṇṇi Iṭṭa tipamālaikku viṭum Eṇṇaikku brahmade yam perumpuliyūr Āṭi gau tamaṉ Ārāamutapiriyātāṉāṉa tirunaṭṭamāṭibha ṭṭaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa kaṇṭarāditya ccaturvvedi maṅkalattup piṭākai Eṭuttapātakallūril Innāyanār tevatāṉamāyp piṟinta nāṭaṟipukaḻviḷākattu koṇṭa nilam 3nta2� Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam karu
ṇākaranallurp piṟinta kulottuṅkacoḻamaṅkala nilam ma�nta kiḻakku va-m Eṭuttapātanallūr tiṟappu nattamaṉai nilam satman=ta kiḻakku va-m Āka nilam 4ma kiḻakku I Innilam nāle kāṇik kiḻaraiyum Ivvāṇṭupacāṉmutal tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka tirunāmattukkāṇiyākak kuṭuttamaiyil Iṉṉilattu Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu candrāditya varai Ivviḷakku Erippatāka viṭṭamaikku Ivai pāmpuṇikiḻāṉ mallā
ṇṭāṉāṉa cerakoṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 5.650 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
